one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer with strong backend and data infrastructure, building user-facing AI from concept to production
narrative_angle: Backend-heavy AI engineer seeking transition to product-focused role, with proven ability to ship end-to-end AI features
lead_strengths: Python and LLM API production experience
End-to-end system architecture and user growth
proof_points_to_emphasize: Built Emote AI companion from 0 to 450+ users with 13-15% weekly retention
Reduced inference cost per conversation by 98%
Led enterprise data platform migration improving reporting reliability
things_to_downplay: No retail or e-commerce domain knowledge
Missing design sensibility and top-tier institute background
tone_guidance: Direct, acknowledges skill gaps, emphasizes transferable AI engineering strengths
recruiter_first_impression_target: Strong AI engineer but missing core frontend and domain requirements
reasoning: Role requires frontend development skills which candidate lacks entirely. Additionally, missing retail/e-commerce experience and design alignment with the brand. Strong AI backend skills are not sufficient to overcome these gaps. Recommend building frontend skills and domain knowledge before applying.
